commit.subject: LU-1030 osc: move io data from lov_oinfo into osc_object
commit.message:
LU-1030 osc: move io data from lov_oinfo into osc_object

DO NOT PUSH THIS IS AN INVESTIGATION INTO LU-482

Test-Parameters: fortestonly \
virtphys=2

testlist=replay-dual,replay-single,\
replay-dual,replay-single,\
replay-dual,replay-single,\
replay-dual,replay-single,\
replay-dual,replay-single,\
replay-dual,replay-single,\
replay-dual,replay-single,\
replay-dual,replay-single,\
replay-dual,replay-single,\
replay-dual,replay-single,\
replay-dual,replay-single,\
replay-dual,replay-single\

Signed-off-by: Chris Gearing <chris@whamcloud.com>
